question: Which students have gone through any event? List the students' biographical data and event date.
sql: SELECT Students.student_id, Students.bio_data, Students.student_details, Student_Events.event_date FROM Students JOIN Student_Events ON Students.student_id = Student_Events.student_id;

back_translation.intent: 查询学生及其相关事件信息

semantic.reason: 过滤条件未体现事件关联性，student_id列表硬编码可能包含无事件记录的学生，且bio_data与student_details字段存在重复选取问题
